title: AACA Module Manifest
description: JSON Schema for MODULE.manifest.yaml — describes a single module within an AACA system.

description.description: Brief description of the module's responsibility.

purpose.description: Detailed explanation of why this module exists and what problem it solves.

files.description: Source files that belong to this module.

path.description: Relative path to the file from the module root.

role.description: Architectural role of the file (e.g. handler, service, repository, model, util).

description.description: What this file is responsible for.

changes_when.description: Describes the circumstances under which this file would need to be modified.

dependencies.description: Modules and contracts this module depends on.

contracts.description: Contract names this module depends on.

capabilities.description: Capability module names this module uses.

infrastructure.description: Infrastructure module names this module uses.

operations.description: Operation module names this module depends on.

depended_on_by.description: Names of modules that depend on this module.

contracts.description: Contracts implemented, published, or consumed by this module.

implements.description: The contract this module implements (if any).

publishes_events.description: Event contract names this module publishes.

consumes_events.description: Event contract names this module consumes.

change_impact.description: Describes which files or modules are affected under various change scenarios.

unit_tests.description: Paths or identifiers for unit test files.

integration_tests.description: Paths or identifiers for integration test files.
